reviews.review_description: I personally like this game, it does what it says and has many varietys of free cosmetics!
good community and overall great game, nice cosmetics, nice owner, nice maps, nice everything. it honseetly is fun and is something i would play in my free time
The game is very laggy and buggy and it’s really poor quality

developer_response.body: Im sorry you feel that way.

reviews.review_description: so i wanted to buy the mod menu so i did and first of all there was only a few and secondly NO ONE ELSE COULD SEE IT. I EVEN TRIED REFUNDING IT AND THEY DIDNT LET ME. DO NOT BUY THIS GAME

developer_response.body: Im sorry but the mods was CLEARLY listed on the sign, and its meant to give you advantages. You should have looked into what you bought before buying it. Thanks.
